[Southern Baltic] POLISH NAV WARN 097/26
SOUTHERN BALTIC. POLISH COAST
DUE TO MILITARY EXERCISES ZONE IS CLOSED FOR SHIPPING AND FISHERY:
S-6 CENTERED 54-39.27N 016-36.59E
FROM 2026-05-10 22:01 TO 2026-05-15 21:59
ON 2026-05-16 FROM 06:00 TO 21:59
ZONE IS CLOSED
CANCEL THIS MSG 162159 UTC MAY
